seo.title: Embeddings & Vector Search implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Embeddings & Vector Search projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist outlines the technical requirements for deploying embedding-based search and retrieval systems into production. It focuses on performance, accuracy, and infrastructure stability.

items.title: Verify Distance Metric Alignment
items.description: Ensure the vector database is configured with the exact distance metric (Cosine, Euclidean, or Dot Product) recommended by the embedding model provider.

items.title: Benchmark Embedding Latency
items.description: Measure the round-trip time for a single vector generation; if it exceeds 200ms, implement a client-side timeout and fallback mechanism.

items.title: Implement Token Truncation Logic
items.description: Programmatically truncate input text to the model's maximum context window (e.g., 8192 tokens for text-embedding-3-small) before calling the API to avoid 400 errors.

items.title: Configure Batch Processing
items.description: Group multiple documents into a single API request up to the provider's batch limit to minimize network overhead during bulk indexing.

items.title: Local Embedding Fallback
items.description: Deploy a lightweight local model (e.g., BGE-micro) as a fallback for critical path queries if the primary embedding API experiences an outage.

items.title: HNSW Parameter Tuning
items.description: Set ef_construction and M parameters based on the dataset size; verify that recall rates meet the 90%+ threshold in a staging environment.

items.title: Index Persistence and Backups
items.description: Configure automated snapshots of the vector index to a persistent storage layer like S3 or GCS to prevent total data loss on node failure.

items.title: Memory-to-Vector Ratio
items.description: Calculate the RAM required to hold the index in memory (Dimensions * 4 bytes * Number of Vectors) and ensure the instance has 20% overhead.

items.title: Metadata Indexing
items.description: Explicitly define which metadata fields require filtering (e.g., user_id, timestamp) and enable indexing on those fields to avoid full-table scans.

items.title: Quantization Evaluation
items.description: Test Scalar Quantization (SQ) or Product Quantization (PQ) to reduce memory footprint and compare the resulting drop in recall against storage savings.

items.title: Hybrid Search Calibration
items.description: Implement a reciprocal rank fusion (RRF) or weighted score algorithm to combine BM25 keyword results with vector similarity scores.

items.title: Query Pre-processing
items.description: Apply the same text normalization (lowercasing, punctuation removal) to the search query that was applied to the document chunks during indexing.

items.title: Top-K Sensitivity Analysis
items.description: Determine the optimal 'k' value by measuring the tradeoff between retrieval recall and the latency added by processing more candidates.

items.title: Reranking Pipeline
items.description: Integrate a Cross-Encoder reranker to re-score the top 20-50 results retrieved from the vector database for higher precision.

items.title: Similarity Thresholding
items.description: Define a minimum similarity score cutoff to prevent the system from returning irrelevant results when no high-quality matches exist.

items.title: Idempotent Upsert Logic
items.description: Use a unique deterministic ID (e.g., a hash of the source URL) for each vector to prevent duplicate entries during pipeline retries.

items.title: Delete Propagation
items.description: Implement a listener on the source database to trigger vector deletions when records are removed from the primary system of record.

items.title: Embedding Versioning
items.description: Include a model_version field in the vector metadata to facilitate zero-downtime migrations when switching to a newer embedding model.

items.title: Change Data Capture (CDC) Latency
items.description: Monitor and alert if the lag between source data updates and vector index updates exceeds a defined threshold (e.g., 5 minutes).

items.title: Chunk Overlap Verification
items.description: Validate that text chunking includes a 10-15% overlap to ensure semantic context is preserved across chunk boundaries.

items.title: Token Usage Tracking
items.description: Log the number of tokens processed per request to monitor costs and detect anomalous spikes in API consumption.

items.title: Vector Drift Monitoring
items.description: Schedule a weekly job to compare the average distance of new embeddings against a baseline to detect shifts in data distribution.

items.title: Multi-tenant Isolation
items.description: Verify that queries are strictly scoped using metadata filters to prevent cross-tenant data leakage in multi-user applications.

items.title: Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) for Failed Embeddings
items.description: Route text snippets that fail the embedding process (e.g., due to content filtering or API errors) to a DLQ for manual inspection.

items.title: Request Rate Limiting
items.description: Implement a leaky-bucket rate limiter on the search endpoint to protect the vector database and embedding API from exhaustion.
